cake.translate: торт, пирожное, кекс, жмых, спекаться, слеживаться, кусковой

examples.eng: Cut the cake.
The cake went fast.
This cake is really yummy.
We shared the cake.
Cut the cake into pieces.
I made three cakes for the party.
examples.ru: Я сделал три торта для вечеринки.

examples.eng: Do you want me to cut the cake?
examples.ru: Ты хочешь, чтобы я разрезал торт?

examples.eng: The cake has three layers.
examples.ru: Этот торт состоит из трёх слоёв.

examples.eng: I offered to bring the cake.
This cake is absolutely delicious.
Nothing beats homemade cake.
examples.ru: С домашним пирогом ничто не сравнится.

examples.eng: How long has the cake been baking?
After the long ride, the horse was caked with mud.
examples.ru: После долгой скачки лошадь была вся в грязи.

examples.eng: Cut the cake into quarters.
examples.ru: Разрежьте торт на четыре равные части.

examples.eng: Bake the cake for 40 minutes.
examples.ru: Выпекайте торт в течение сорока минут.

examples.eng: Sally decided to bake him a cake.
She nibbled daintily at her cake.
They shared the cake between them.
She refused a second piece of cake.
examples.ru: Она отказалась от второго кусочка пирога.

examples.eng: They set the cake down on the table.
Do you want some birthday cake?
Would you like a slice of cake?
The mud had caked on his boots.
examples.ru: Грязь на его сапогах уже засохла.

examples.eng: Bake the cake for 25–30 minutes.
The cake was a bit burnt on top.
The cake has a rectangular shape.
The cake was rectangular in shape.
Go on, have another piece of cake.
examples.ru: Ну же, возьми ещё кусочек торта.

examples.eng: Please help yourself to some cake.
a cake with an almond paste filling
examples.ru: торт с начинкой из миндальной пасты
